markdown:
# Hit Point Dice

Hit Point Dice, or Hit Dice for short, help determine a [[player_character]] Hit Point maximum, as explained in chapter 2. Most [[monster]] also have Hit Dice. A creature can spend Hit Dice during a [[short_rest]] to regain [[hit_points]].
